name: Brian's Apple Brownies
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Granny Smith apples (1 lb.), chopped and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 15 1/2 x 10 1/2 x 1 inch jelly-roll pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
4. In another large bowl, whisk together the oil, eggs until blended and smooth. Stir in sugar and vanilla extract.
5. Add the flour mixture to the oil mixture until combined. Stir in chopped apples, nuts, and raisins (if using). The mixture will be stiff.
6. Pour evenly into prepared pan.
7. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until golden brown and a toothpick comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool completely on wire rack before cutting into squares.
Per Brownie:
Calories without raisins: 165 Fat: 9 grams Sodium: 60 mg.
